data.title: OpenAI Acquires Software Applications to Enhance ChatGPT Integration
data.description:
According to PANews, OpenAI has announced the acquisition of Software Applications Incorporated, the developer of Sky. Sky is a natural language interface for Mac that interprets screen content and interacts with applications. OpenAI plans to integrate Sky's deep macOS capabilities into ChatGPT, with the entire team of approximately 12 members joining OpenAI.

Software Applications was founded in 2023 by a group of former Apple employees, some of whom contributed to the development of the iPhone's 'Shortcuts' app technology. The company previously raised $6.5 million from notable investors, including OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and Figma CEO Dylan Field. Earlier this year, Software Applications launched Sky, an AI assistant designed to help users perform tasks or answer questions through a floating interface that understands on-screen content. Sky has not yet been publicly released.

data.title: Tesla did not sell Bitcoin in the third quarter of 2025
data.description: Musk's Tesla disclosed that as of the third quarter of 2025, the company held approximately $1.3 billion in Bitcoin without selling any of it, indicating that Tesla continues to hold Bitcoin as part of its assets for the long term. The rise in Bitcoin prices in the third quarter enabled Tesla to earn approximately $80 million in profits.

data.title: Trump cancels meeting with Putin in Budapest
data.description: According to CCTV News, on October 22, local time, US President Trump said he did not think it was appropriate to meet with Russian President Vladimir Putin, so he canceled his meeting with Putin in Budapest. Trump said he believed it was time to impose sanctions on Russia and he hoped the sanctions would not last too long.

data.title: The probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in October is 97.3%.
data.description: According to CME's "Fed Watch," the probability of the Fed cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in October is 97.3%, while the probability of keeping rates unchanged is 2.7%. The probability of the Fed cutting interest rates by 50 basis points in December is 95.5%, and the probability of a cumulative 75 basis point cut has dropped to 0%.

data.title: Fed loses access to "small non-farm payroll" data
data.description: Nick Timiraos, a prominent Fed spokesperson, wrote that Federal Reserve officials recently lost access to third-party employment data. Since 2018, payroll processor ADP has provided the Fed with a dataset containing anonymized employment and earnings information, covering 20% ​​of the US private sector workforce. The Fed typically receives this data with a delay of approximately one week, making it a timely and comprehensive measure of labor market conditions. According to sources familiar with the matter, ADP stopped providing the Fed with this data after Fed Governor Waller delivered a speech in late August that drew public attention to the Fed's long-standing use of ADP employment data. The specific reasons for this change are unclear. Waller cited the ADP data in a footnote accompanying his speech, further emphasizing his concerns about a slowing labor market. The footnote noted that preliminary estimates showed hiring continued to deteriorate over the summer, and that the data covered a period beyond the coverage of the latest government data.

data.title: Kraken: Tokenized US stock product xStocks has surpassed $5 billion in trading volume since launch
data.description: Crypto exchange Kraken announced that its tokenized US stock product xStocks for non-US users has traded over $5 billion since its launch, with over $1 billion in on-chain transactions and over 37,000 holders.

data.title: Farage, leader of the UK Reform Party, supports cryptocurrencies but vows to go to jail to prevent the UK from issuing a CBDC
data.description: Nigel Farage, leader of the UK's Reform Party, stated in London that he would do everything in his power to prevent the UK from issuing a central bank digital currency (CBDC), calling it a "complete nightmare" and vowing to "go to jail rather than accept it." He promised that if he came to power, he would establish a "Bitcoin Digital Reserve," lower crypto taxes, and prohibit banks from closing accounts due to crypto transactions, with the goal of making London a global crypto hub.

data.title: Kalshi's fundraising continues, and its valuation may rise to $12 billion in the short term
data.description: Kalshi, a US-regulated prediction market platform, is receiving venture capital proposals with a potential valuation of up to $12 billion. Less than two weeks ago, Kalshi closed a funding round exceeding $300 million at a valuation of $5 billion. Investor interest in the fast-growing startup is high, with discussions of valuations ranging from $10 billion to $12 billion, or even higher.
